  name: "Mohammad Sadil Khan"
  title: "AI for Spatial Intelligence."
  summary: "I am a PhD student at RPTU Kaiserslautern and DFKI, supervised by Prof. Dr. Didier Stricker. My work focuses on 3D reconstruction, multimodal learning, and generative CAD systems that turn natural inputs into editable geometry."

research:
  - title: "CAD Generative AI"
    icon: "fa-pen-ruler"
    summary: "Parametric and editable 3D model generation from text, point clouds, and other multimodal inputs."
    publications:
      - title: "NURBGen"
        url: "https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.06194"
        detail: "NURBS-based CAD generation from text"
        venue: "AAAI 2026"
      - title: "TextCAD"
        url: "https://sadilkhan.github.io/text2cad-project/"
        detail: "Text-to-editable CAD generation"
        venue: "NeurIPS 2024 Spotlight"
      - title: "CAD-SIGNet"
        url: "http://skazizali.com/cadsignet.github.io/"
        detail: "CAD design history from point clouds"
        venue: "CVPR 2024 Highlight"
  - title: "3D Reconstruction"
    icon: "fa-cubes"
    summary: "High-fidelity 3D models and scenes from text, images, and video, with an emphasis on scalable representations."
    publications:
      - title: "MARVEL-40M+"
        url: "https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.17945"
        detail: "Large-scale 3D captioning dataset"
        venue: "CVPR 2025"
  - title: "3D Understanding"
    icon: "fa-brain"
    summary: "Geometric-semantic alignment for AI systems that can reason about objects, structure, and editable scenes."
    publications: []
  - title: "Efficient 3D Representation"
    icon: "fa-shapes"
    summary: "Compact surface and mesh representations for high-resolution generation without sacrificing editability."
    publications: 
        - title: "DreamCAD"
          url: "https://arxiv.org/abs/2411.17945"
          detail: "Bezier-Patch-based CAD generation"
          venue: "Arxiv"
